interestingFact: 195 countries and somehow they still can't figure out world peace. Impressive.
Has the tallest mountain in the world and still no one's heard of anything else you've done.
Built the most iconic structures in human history 4000 years ago and has been living off that reputation ever since.
A whole continent to themselves and they chose to put all the deadliest animals there. Truly unhinged.
Has the largest rainforest in the world and is doing everything possible to get rid of it.
Built one giant iron tower and now acts like they invented civilization. Also somehow always on strike.
Largest country in the world by area and still somehow always in everyone else's business.
Built a wall thousands of miles long to keep people out and it didn't even work. 1 star, would not recommend.
Puts their date as month/day/year, uses Fahrenheit, and refuses to go metric.
